2348460.name: Scarlet Lake (Old Page)
2348460.description:
Scarlet Lake is a small fictional town in rural America where the people are close knit and don't take kindly to outsiders. After some strange disappearances with questionable investigations you are sent into the town along with your partner to find out what's really going on. You find yourselves entangled in a web of dark secrets and unimaginable horrors. Will you escape with your life ?

Heavily inspired by retro survival horror games Scarlet Lake follows similar themes and general mechanics that fans of the genre will be used to.

Scavenge for supplies, upgrade your arsenal and fight through hordes of terrifying creatures to uncover the truth of what sent this town mad.
2348460.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
